about.description: For nearly two decades, Dric Interior has redefined the boundaries of luxury living. We believe that an interior is more than a space; it is an extension of identity. Our process merges technical innovation with soulful artistry.

story.body: At Dric Interior, we specialise in creating luxurious, bespoke interiors that reflect the unique style and personality of each client. With a keen eye for detail and a passion for design excellence, our team of experts transforms spaces into sophisticated, functional works of art. Whether you're looking to revamp a single room or redesign an entire home, we deliver unparalleled quality and elegance in every project.

tallImage.alt: Interior detail - textured wall and sculptural lamp

squareImage.alt: Architecture - clean lines and natural materials

milestones.title: The Legacy of Excellence
milestones.description: Our journey is marked by the trust of our clients and the enduring beauty of the spaces we've realised across the globe.

items.label: Years of Excellence
items.description: Two decades of perfecting the art of luxury living through dedicated research and design.

items.label: Successful Projects
items.description: From private penthouses to boutique resorts, our portfolio spans continents and styles.

items.label: Client Satisfaction
items.description: Every project closes with a satisfied client - our most important measure of success.

items.title: Bespoke Curation
items.description: Every project begins with deep listening - understanding your vision and aspirations to craft a space uniquely yours.

items.title: Material Mastery
items.description: We source only the world's finest materials - natural stone, bespoke textiles, and artisan finishes that speak to quality.

items.title: Ethical Craft
items.description: Beauty and responsibility coexist. We choose sustainable sources and skilled craftspeople who share our values.

items.title: Soulful Living
items.description: A great interior transcends aesthetics - it nourishes daily life, creating environments that feel as good as they look.

hero.description: We transform architectural voids into soulful environments. Dric Interior provides a full spectrum of luxury atelier services, from bespoke furniture design to holistic exterior visions.

items.title: Discovery
items.description: A deep-dive consultation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and the unique character of your space.

items.title: Design Concept
items.description: Mood boards, spatial plans, and material palettes developed and refined until every detail resonates.

items.title: Procurement
items.description: We source and commission every element - from bespoke furniture to specialist finishes - with precision.

items.title: Execution
items.description: Our project team oversees every stage of installation with meticulous attention to detail and craft.

cta.description: Ready to work with a studio that brings vision and precision to every project? Let us craft a space worthy of your story.

furniture-fittings.title: Furniture & Fittings
furniture-fittings.tagline: Objects that hold the room and the memory.

heroImage.alt: Bespoke furniture in a refined residential interior

furniture-fittings.overview: Every object in a room carries weight - not merely in mass, but in meaning. Our furniture and fittings service is rooted in a philosophy of craft over commodity. We design and source pieces that exist in precise dialogue with the architecture, light, and lives that inhabit a space. From the curve of a sofa arm to the grain direction of a dining table, each decision is made with the whole room in mind.

highlights.title: Bespoke Design
highlights.description: Custom furniture conceived from scratch - scaled, proportioned, and detailed to suit your exact spatial and aesthetic brief.

highlights.title: Material Curation
highlights.description: Leathers, velvets, marbles, solid timbers, and hand-forged metals - sourced from artisan suppliers and specialist mills worldwide.

highlights.title: FF&E Procurement
highlights.description: We manage the full furniture, fixtures, and equipment specification process - budgeting, supplier coordination, and delivery logistics included.

highlights.title: Residential & Commercial
highlights.description: Whether a private penthouse or a luxury boutique hotel, our approach maintains the same exacting standard of finish and intent.

gallery.alt: Marble dining table with sculptural chairs
gallery.caption: Bespoke dining collection - private residence, Lagos

gallery.alt: Custom upholstered sofa in a warm living room
gallery.caption: Custom lounge furniture - hospitality suite, Abuja

gallery.alt: Solid timber shelving unit with brass fittings
gallery.caption: Bespoke shelving & cabinetry - executive office, Victoria Island

process.title: Brief & Measure
process.body: We begin with a thorough site measure and a conversation about how you live, work, and move through the space - capturing dimensions and desires simultaneously.

process.title: Design Development
process.body: Sketches, 3D models, and material samples are developed and refined until each piece is fully resolved - before a single workshop order is placed.

process.title: Workshop & Fabrication
process.body: Pieces are commissioned through our network of vetted craftspeople - from furniture-makers in the UK to upholstery ateliers on the continent.

process.title: Installation & Styling
process.body: Our team oversees white-glove delivery and placement, followed by a final styling pass to ensure every element reads as intended.

furniture-fittings.closingStatement: Furniture is not decoration - it is the architecture of daily life. We build pieces that last beyond trends and outlive fashion.

cta.title: Ready to Begin?
cta.description: Let's discuss your project. Our atelier is ready to bring precision and vision to your space.

window-covering.title: Window Covering
window-covering.tagline: Every view deserves a frame worthy of it.

heroImage.alt: Precision-tailored drapes in a luxury interior

window-covering.overview: Light is the most transformative material in any interior. Our window covering service approaches curtains, blinds, and treatments not as afterthoughts, but as primary architectural elements. We modulate sunlight, frame external views, and add layers of warmth and texture - all while ensuring seamless mechanical function and longevity of fabric and fixings.

highlights.title: Bespoke Drapes & Curtains
highlights.description: Floor-to-ceiling, hand-pleated, and precisely tracked - from sheer linens that breathe with the room to heavy silks that anchor it.

highlights.title: Roller & Roman Blinds
highlights.description: Clean-lined fabric systems engineered for precision control of light and privacy, available in motorised configurations.

highlights.title: Motorisation & Smart Integration
highlights.description: Lutron, Somfy, and custom motor systems integrated with your building management or smart home platform.

highlights.title: Fabric Sourcing
highlights.description: We work with premier fabric houses - Dedar, Rubelli, Zimmer + Rohde, and independent weavers - to source materials unavailable in the retail market.

gallery.alt: Sheer linen curtains in a bright bedroom
gallery.caption: Sheer linen drapes - master bedroom, Ikoyi

gallery.alt: Rich velvet curtains in a formal living room
gallery.caption: Hand-pleated velvet curtains - formal sitting room, Lekki

gallery.alt: Roman blinds in a contemporary kitchen
gallery.caption: Motorised roman blinds - open-plan kitchen, Banana Island

process.title: Light Study
process.body: We assess how natural light moves through your space at different times of day - informing opacity, colour, and fabric weight choices.

process.title: Specification
process.body: Track type, heading style, lining, and interlining are specified alongside fabric - all decisions made with both aesthetics and thermal performance in mind.

process.title: Making & Fitting
process.body: All treatments are made to measure by our specialist workrooms and installed by experienced fitters who leave no hem, no crease, and no gap.

process.title: Commissioning
process.body: Motorised systems are commissioned and tested on-site, with a handover session covering full operation and maintenance.

window-covering.closingStatement: The right window treatment does not just dress a window - it defines the mood of the entire room from morning light to candlelit evening.

cta.title: Ready to Begin?
cta.description: Let's discuss your project. Our atelier is ready to bring precision and vision to your space.

wall-covering.title: Wall Covering

heroImage.alt: Artisanal wall covering in a refined interior

wall-covering.overview: Walls are not boundaries - they are the primary sensory canvas of a room. Our wall covering service moves far beyond paint and standard wallpaper. We deploy artisanal techniques, specialist finishes, and curated materials to create surfaces that reward close inspection, change under different light, and anchor a room's identity with quiet authority.

highlights.title: Specialist Paint Finishes
highlights.description: Limewash, colour-washed plaster, lacquered surfaces, and bespoke hues mixed to exact specification - applied by specialist decorators.

highlights.title: Artisanal Wallpaper
highlights.description: Hand-printed, embossed, fabric-backed, and grasscloth papers sourced from leading houses including de Gournay, Fornasetti, and Arte.

highlights.title: Venetian & Microcement Plaster
highlights.description: Applied plasters that create depth, texture, and a tactile quality no flat paint can replicate - suitable for wet rooms and living areas alike.

highlights.title: Stone & Tile Cladding
highlights.description: Travertine, marble, slate, and handmade ceramic applied as wall cladding for feature walls, entrance halls, and bathrooms.

gallery.alt: Limewash finish in a warm living room
gallery.caption: Limewash plaster finish - living room feature wall, Ikoyi
Grasscloth wallcovering - home study, Lekki Phase 1

gallery.alt: Marble wall cladding in a bathroom
gallery.caption: Bookmatched marble cladding - principal bathroom, Banana Island

process.title: Surface Assessment
process.body: We evaluate the existing substrate - identifying any preparation work required before a covering can be applied to the standard our finishes demand.

process.title: Material Selection
process.body: Sample boards are prepared and viewed in your actual space under your actual light - because a sample in a showroom lies about how it will perform at home.

process.title: Application
process.body: Specialist applicators - plasterers, paperhangers, and tilers from our trusted trades network - carry out the work with precision and care.

process.title: Finish & Protect
process.body: Appropriate sealants, wax finishes, and maintenance protocols are applied and communicated to ensure long-term beauty and durability.

wall-covering.closingStatement: A wall that is merely painted is a wall that is merely functional. We make walls that tell the story of a space from the moment you enter the room.

cta.title: Ready to Begin?
cta.description: Let's discuss your project. Our atelier is ready to bring precision and vision to your space.

exterior-design.title: Exterior Design
exterior-design.tagline: The outside is part of the story.

heroImage.alt: Refined exterior architecture with landscape design

exterior-design.overview: The boundary between inside and outside is a fiction in great design. Our exterior design service ensures the visual character, material language, and spatial quality of the interior extends seamlessly beyond the threshold. We design terraces, facades, landscapes, and external lighting schemes that are as considered as every room within.

highlights.title: Facade Design & Cladding
highlights.description: Material specification and design development for building exteriors - from natural stone and timber to render, metal, and composite panels.

highlights.title: Landscape & Planting Design
highlights.description: Formal and naturalistic planting schemes, hardscape design, and pool surrounds that create a curated outdoor living environment.

highlights.title: Terrace & Outdoor Living
highlights.description: External furniture selection, shade structures, outdoor kitchens, and flooring materials specified for beauty and weather resilience.

highlights.title: Exterior Lighting
highlights.description: Architectural lighting schemes that extend usability into evening hours and illuminate the building's character after dark.

gallery.alt: Landscaped pool terrace with external furniture
gallery.caption: Pool terrace and landscape - private residence, Lekki

gallery.alt: Natural stone facade with illuminated entrance
gallery.caption: Stone facade and lighting - residential villa, Abuja
Covered outdoor living - penthouse terrace, Ikoyi

process.title: Site Analysis
process.body: We study orientation, microclimate, neighbouring context, and existing landscape features before developing any design proposal.

process.title: Concept Design
process.body: A holistic concept is developed that considers facade character, planting strategy, circulation, and the visual relationship with the interior.

process.title: Technical Development
process.body: Detailed drawings, material specifications, and planting schedules are produced for contractor tender and client approval.

process.title: Works Oversight
process.body: We maintain site presence during critical phases to ensure material selections, planting positions, and finish quality meet the design intent.

exterior-design.closingStatement: The most memorable homes are not defined by their walls alone - they are defined by the entire territory they inhabit, inside and out.

cta.title: Ready to Begin?
cta.description: Let's discuss your project. Our atelier is ready to bring precision and vision to your space.

signage-identity.title: Signage & Identity

heroImage.alt: Environmental branding in a luxury commercial space

signage-identity.overview: For commercial and hospitality environments, identity does not end at a logo on a wall - it permeates every surface, every sign, every spatial experience. Our signage and identity service translates brand values into three-dimensional, spatial realities. We design and deliver environmental graphics, wayfinding systems, and custom branded installations that communicate with elegance and intent.

highlights.title: Environmental Branding
highlights.description: Dimensional lettering, brand walls, and material expressions of identity embedded within the architecture of your space.

highlights.title: Wayfinding Systems
highlights.description: Cohesive signage systems for lobbies, corridors, and multi-level buildings - functional, legible, and visually refined.

highlights.title: Custom Installations
highlights.description: Bespoke sculptural and graphic installations - from reception feature pieces to large-format printed wall murals.

highlights.title: Hospitality & Retail
highlights.description: Branded interiors for hotels, restaurants, boutiques, and corporate headquarters - where every touchpoint reinforces the brand experience.

gallery.caption: Illuminated brand identity - boutique hotel lobby, Lagos

gallery.alt: Wayfinding system in a corporate office
gallery.caption: Wayfinding system - corporate headquarters, Victoria Island

gallery.alt: Brand wall in a restaurant interior
gallery.caption: Environmental brand installation - restaurant interior, Abuja

process.title: Brand Immersion
process.body: We spend time understanding your brand values, audience, and the story you need your space to tell before a single design is drawn.

process.title: Spatial Mapping
process.body: Every sign location, brand moment, and wayfinding decision point is mapped against the space plan before design development begins.

process.title: Design & Prototyping
process.body: Scaled designs are developed and in key cases prototyped in physical form - ensuring scale, material, and finish read correctly in the actual space.

process.title: Fabrication & Installation
process.body: Our specialist fabricators and installers deliver and fix every element with precision, leaving a finished environment that performs as designed.

signage-identity.closingStatement: The spaces that people remember are not the ones they merely visit - they are the ones that speak directly to them from the walls, floors, and ceilings.

cta.title: Ready to Begin?
cta.description: Let's discuss your project. Our atelier is ready to bring precision and vision to your space.

ceiling-covering.title: Ceiling Covering
ceiling-covering.tagline: The fifth wall deserves the same attention as the other four.

heroImage.alt: Bespoke coffered ceiling in a luxury interior

ceiling-covering.overview: The ceiling is the single largest continuous surface in any room, yet it is the most routinely overlooked. Our ceiling covering service reclaims this surface as a primary design element - deploying coffered millwork, hand-applied plaster details, acoustic panels, stretched fabrics, and bespoke painted finishes to transform what lies above into a statement as considered as anything below.

highlights.title: Coffered & Panelled Millwork
highlights.description: Timber and MDF coffer systems - designed, finished, and installed to bring classical or contemporary order to any ceiling plane.

highlights.title: Plaster Mouldings & Cornices
highlights.description: Traditional and contemporary plasterwork - from run-in-situ cornices to GRG panel systems and decorative ceiling roses.

highlights.title: Acoustic Ceiling Panels
highlights.description: High-performance acoustic tiles and baffles specified and designed to improve the acoustic environment without sacrificing aesthetic quality.

highlights.title: Stretched Fabric & Specialist Finishes
highlights.description: Stretched fabric systems, metallic leafing, limewash, and trompe-l'oeil sky finishes for ceilings that invite upward glances.

gallery.alt: Coffered timber ceiling in a formal dining room
gallery.caption: Timber coffered ceiling - formal dining room, Ikoyi

gallery.alt: Ornate plaster cornice in a grand entrance hall
gallery.caption: Bespoke plaster cornice - entrance hall, Banana Island

gallery.alt: Acoustic panel ceiling in a contemporary office
gallery.caption: Acoustic panel system - corporate boardroom, Victoria Island

process.title: Structural Review
process.body: We assess ceiling height, structural constraints, M&E positions, and lighting requirements before developing a design proposal.

process.title: Design Development
process.body: Scale drawings and material specifications are produced - coordinating with lighting, mechanical, and structural engineers as required.

process.title: Fabrication
process.body: Millwork, plaster elements, and panel systems are fabricated off-site wherever possible to maintain quality and minimise disruption.

process.title: Installation & Finishing
process.body: Our specialist installers fix, fill, and finish every element on-site - with paint, gilding, or fabric applied as a final stage.

ceiling-covering.closingStatement: A great room is complete in every direction. We make certain that when someone looks up, they are met with the same quality of thought as everywhere else.

studioImage.alt: Dric Interior studio - material samples and design boards

introParagraphs: We at Dric Interior are committed to protecting the privacy of any information given by our customers. Under law, your rights to privacy are also protected. The National Privacy Principles, the Privacy Act and general law place strict requirements on us to treat certain information collected as confidential.
Our secure server will protect any personal information that you submit.

sections.title: Collection
paragraphs: We collect information to provide a bespoke interior design experience. This includes personal identifiers such as your name, email address, and phone number when you inquire about our services.
Additionally, we may collect project-specific details including floor plans, preferences, and aesthetic inspirations to facilitate our design process.

sections.title: Usage
paragraphs: We might, on occasions, use this information to notify you of any important changes to our site or any special promotions that may be of interest to you.
bullets: Communicating updates regarding your design project.
Tailoring our portfolio presentations to match your style.
Processing invoices and managing contractual agreements.

sections.title: Protection
paragraphs: We implement industry-standard security measures to safeguard your personal data. All digital interactions are encrypted, and access to client files is restricted to authorized personnel directly involved in your project. We do not sell or trade your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: Third Parties
paragraphs: By using the dricinterior.com site, you are consenting to the collection of information by dricinterior.com. If any changes to these policies occur, we will notify our customers by updating this section of our website.

sections.title: Your Rights
paragraphs: Protecting your personal and order information is a priority at Dric Interior. We want you to be able to order from dricinterior.com with total confidence.

As such we have created a secure transaction environment. We use Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) technology. Our online ordering system is the industry standard for encryption technology to protect your online order information. SSL encrypts all information including all personal information passed from you to dricinterior.com.

image.alt: Minimalist luxury interior with warm lighting

imageBreak.quote: "Elegance is not about being noticed, it's about being remembered while remaining private."

hero.quote: "Our commitment to quality and the nature of bespoke curation."

sections.title: Bespoke Curation & Finality of Sale
paragraphs: At Dric Interior each piece is an intentional acquisition. Our collections are composed of meticulously selected artifacts and custom-commissioned works that represent the pinnacle of artisanal craftsmanship. Due to the unique sourcing and personalized nature of these assets, all sales are considered final upon confirmation of acquisition.
This policy ensures the integrity of our inventory and respects the delicate provenance of the curated objects within our studio.

sections.title: Quality Assurance & Discrepancies
paragraphs: While we maintain rigorous quality controls, we acknowledge the complexities of logistical transit. Should an item arrive with visible defects or damage incurred during delivery, we require notification within a strict 48-hour window.
sections.protocolBody: Please document the condition upon arrival and contact our caretaker immediately to initiate a prompt resolution or replacement. Delay beyond 2 days may forfeit eligibility for claim.

sections.title: Return Eligibility
paragraphs: As part of our commitment to exclusivity, Dric Interior does not accept returns or exchanges based on change of preference or aesthetic reconsideration. Each acquisition is a deliberate engagement with our curated aesthetic.
The personalized and often made-to-order nature of the studio's offerings renders the standard retail return model inapplicable to our service standards.
sections.highlight: does not accept returns or exchanges

sections.title: Communication & Support
paragraphs: Our team remains at your disposal to clarify any aspects of our acquisition terms or to provide further details on specific pieces prior to purchase.

standard.title: The Dric Standard
standard.copy: Every acquisition is a pact of taste and trust. We thank you for your discerning commitment to our philosophy.

hero.description: An intimate look into the experiences of those who have invited the Dric Interior aesthetic into their private sanctuaries.

featuredTestimonial.quote: "Sincerely, they are very professional, I appreciate the way they used to relate with customers, it is just wonderful. The job they did for me is very very neat and good. Please keep it up, God bless you. I love you."
featuredTestimonial.author: Enoch Adeleke

image.alt: Luxurious living room transformed by Dric Interior

secondaryTestimonial.quote: "Dric interior gives the best at affordable rate and has the picture of his customer status and assumption of what the customer suit and brings it to actualization. Dric brings out who you are in interior decor."
